use_codes.desc: CLOSURE OF A CLINICALLY SIGNIFICANT PATENT DUCTUS ARTERIOSUS IN PREMATURE INFANTS WEIGHING BETWEEN 500 AND 1500G, WHO ARE NO MORE THAN 32 WEEKS GESTATIONAL AGE WHEN USUAL MEDICAL MANAGEMENT IS INEFFECTIVE
